technical_replicate: 618 proteins were identified with at least two unique peptides across both technical replicates
experimental_design: FhEVs were added to bone-marrow derived dendritic cells
factor_value: FhEVs induced a mixed Th1/Th2 immune response with high antigen specific antibody titres in the presence of alum
number_of_fractions: isolated using a gravity flow method
number_of_technical_replicates: two unique peptides across both technical replicates
